message:
fix(key_management): preserve slot IDs during revocation, fix compilation

- Fix critical bug: slot IDs are part of AES-GCM AAD, so renumbering
  after revocation breaks decryption. Keep slot IDs stable.
- Add key_management module to pages mod.rs
- Add Debug derive to RecoverySecret for AddKeyResult enum
- Enable chrono serde feature for DateTime serialization
- Add schema_hash_matches helper to tantivy module
- Remove unused imports (SecretKey, Context, Deserialize)

All 9 key_management tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ dirs = "*"
 walkdir = "*"
 glob = "*"
 base64 = "0.22"
-chrono = "*"
+chrono = { version = "*", features = ["serde"] }
 semver = "*"
 tracing-appender = "*"
 strsim = "0.11.1"
